output:
The box.

From Emma's perspective, she has no knowledge of the key ever being moved. She was observing elephants when George took the key to the office, she was under the tree canopy (putting her sunglasses in her bag) while David was in the reptile house, and she was at the parrot interaction session when David returned the key to the box. Since Emma never witnessed any of the key's movements, she would look in its default, well-known location — **the box**.
